tasks.title: Analyze and enable whole-suite conformance runs
tasks.notes: Documented blockers: recursive interpreter stack overflow, global CURRENT_DEPTH counter, huge unsupported feature surface, baseline/harness gaps, runtime bugs. Plan: stabilize, generate full reports, fix bugs with regression tests, expand supported features.

tasks.title: Implement trampoline interpreter with explicit call stack
tasks.notes: Replace recursive interpreter with heap-allocated Vec<CallFrame> and trampoline loop. Fixes native stack overflow, enables MAX_JS_STACK guard and tail-call optimization.

tasks.title: Research validation
tasks.notes: Validated direction against QuickJS, Boa, test262 harnesses, and trampoline literature. Confirmed: explicit stack is canonical, bytecode comes after correctness, real harness files should be loaded, value optimizations are deferred.
